table.style: width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; table-layout:fixed; font-family:'Times New Roman', serif; color:#000;
width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-family:'Times New Roman', serif; color:#000; font-size:14px; font-weight:normal; line-height:1.05;

td.style: font-size:18px; font-weight:normal; text-decoration:underline; padding:0 2px 3px 2px; vertical-align:top; line-height:1.05;

div.span: Project Overview and Summary Update Status
Area of Concern and Problem Identification

tr.td: 1. Work Summary during Report Activity and Schedule for the Following Week

t.t-if: line.value_ids.filtered(lambda v: v.column_id.id == col.id and v.value)

div.span: Project Overview and Summary Update Status
Area of Concern and Problem Identification
Activity Report Summary and Next Week's Schedule
